description: issue #193: Turtle & Rendering primitive arities are now registered in the parser's reader, so `forward 100` and its sibling fixed-arity turtle commands (back/left/right/set_xy/set_heading/home) group their arguments correctly and parse with zero diagnostics, instead of the previous Layer-1 ol-bad-token caused by the reader defaulting an unregistered name to arity 0 (spec/commands.md's Turtle movement table).
